creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unluckily I don't have a smart card to test gnucash with, so I can't even try to reproduce this. My bank is not using this technology.


Due to this I can olny give suggestions and ask for information to try to help.

Have someone of you tried my suggestions in comment 1 and comment 3?

Could you share some logs and debugging messages generated?
